title: T-020 — Reference.ManufacturingOperations schema + bakery/pharma/fmcg/generic seeds (ADR-028 extension)
prompt:
# T-020 — Reference.ManufacturingOperations schema + bakery/pharma/fmcg/generic seeds (ADR-028 extension)

PRD: `00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §9.1
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
Create the Reference.ManufacturingOperations table per §9.1 with the per-tenant uniqueness constraint and seed bakery + pharma + fmcg + generic operation sets.

## Implementation contract
Migration 012-manufacturing-ops.sql copying the verbatim DDL from PRD §9.1 (id UUID, tenant_id UUID, operation_name TEXT, process_suffix TEXT, description, operation_seq INT, industry_code TEXT, is_active BOOLEAN, marker TEXT) plus UNIQUE(tenant_id, process_suffix) and CHECK(process_suffix ~ '^[A-Z0-9]{2,4}$'). Seed four industry sets: bakery (Mix/Knead/Proof/Bake → MX/KN/PR/BK), pharma (Synthesis/Separation/Crystallization/Drying → SY/SE/CZ/DR), fmcg (Mix/Fill/Seal/Label → MX/FL/SL/LB), generic (Process_A..D → PA/PB/PC/PD). Test asserts the four seed sets exist, the unique-per-tenant constraint blocks duplicates, and the regex check rejects '!!' as a suffix.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/012-manufacturing-ops.sql [create]
- packages/db/seeds/manufacturing-operations.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/manufacturing-ops.integration.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the four industry seeds run for one tenant, when SELECT industry_code, count(*) FROM Reference.ManufacturingOperations runs, then bakery=4, pharma=4, fmcg=4, generic=4
2. Given an INSERT with process_suffix='MX' for a tenant that already has 'MX', when committed, then PostgreSQL rejects with the unique-violation error
3. Given an INSERT with process_suffix='!!', when attempted, then the CHECK constraint rejects it

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/manufacturing-ops.integration.test.ts asserting seeds + uniqueness + regex before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test:integration -- manufacturing-ops'

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode operation_name in code — PRD §9.1 makes it ORG-CONFIG

## Dependencies (must be complete first)
- T-006
- T-019

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED test before implementation) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.
